node_context:
9 classical hippocampal GABAergic interneuron types:
1. PV basket cell (pv_basket_cell_hippocampus) — Pvalb+, fast-spiking, perisomatic targeting, str. pyramidale soma
2. CCK basket cell (cck_basket_cell_hippocampus) — Cck+/Cnr1+/Vglut3+, regular-spiking, perisomatic, str. pyramidale soma
3. Axo-axonic/chandelier cell (axo_axonic_cell_hippocampus) — Pvalb+, targets AIS, str. pyramidale soma
4. Bistratified cell (bistratified_cell_hippocampus) — Pvalb+/Sst+, dendrite-targeting, str. oriens soma, axon in radiatum+oriens
5. OLM cell (olm_cell_ca1) — Sst+/Chrna2+, soma in str. oriens, axon to str. lacunosum-moleculare
6. Hippocampo-septal cell (hippocampo_septal_cell_ca1) — Sst+/mGluR1a+/CB-/nNOS+, str. oriens soma, long-range projection to medial septum
7. Neurogliaform cell (neurogliaform_cell_hippocampus) — Ndnf+/nNOS+, late-spiking, dense local axon, volume transmission GABA
8. Ivy cell (ivy_cell_hippocampus) — nNOS+/NPY+/Ndnf-, late-spiking, str. pyramidale soma, axon in radiatum
9. IS interneuron (is_interneuron_hippocampus) — VIP+/CR+, interneuron-selective targeting, IS-1/IS-2/IS-3 subtypes

KEY PRIORITIES for this traversal:
P1: Soma locations — confirm layer for all 9 types from morphology literature
P2: Transcriptomics datasets — multimodal studies bridging classical → transcriptomic (patch-seq, MERFISH+IHC, multiplexed FISH, Chrna2-Cre + scRNAseq)
P3: Split terms — IS interneuron IS-1/IS-2/IS-3 subtype split; IvC vs nNOS+ NGC boundary
P4: Conflicting assertions — PV+ OLM subpopulation; Ndnf protein vs Cre-driver; Tac1 protein for bistratified; Nos1 universality in NGC
P5: HS cell primary characterisation — very thin evidence (1 quote only)
query: hippocampal GABAergic interneuron types: soma location, markers, morphology, electrophysiology, transcriptomic correspondence, patch-seq and MERFISH bridging datasets, IS-1/IS-2/IS-3 subtypes, ivy cell vs neurogliaform boundary, hippocampo-septal cell characterisation
